creator: dcarmich@dcarmichael.net
text:
I have updated emulators/open-vm-tools to 9.2.3, and added a patch (http://sourceforge.net/p/open-vm-tools/tracker/152/) to successfully build all the modules and vmtoolsd on FreeBSD.

The port patch is attached.

Fix: Patch attached.

Patch attached with submission follows:
